howToConnect.title: How to Connect
howToConnect.description: Set up Claude Desktop or other MCP clients to access your LMS data.
howToConnect.step1: Create a token above and copy the Claude Desktop config snippet.
howToConnect.step2: Open Claude Desktop settings and find the MCP servers configuration file.
howToConnect.step3: Paste the config snippet and save.
howToConnect.step4: Restart Claude Desktop — you should see the LMS tools available.

landing.heroTitle:
Master your
Future with
LMS V2
landing.heroSubtitle: The ultimate learning platform for developers
landing.heroDescription: Master the latest technologies with our AI-powered platform. Interactive, fast, and designed for modern learning.
landing.featuresDescription: We've designed LMS V2 to provide you with the best possible educational experience using cutting-edge technology.
landing.feature1Description: Get instant help and deep code reviews powered by state-of-the-art AI models.
landing.feature2Description: Lessons that come to life. Interact with code directly on the platform securely.
landing.feature3Description: Earn points, unlock achievements, and maintain your learning streak with our incentive system.
landing.feature4Description: Validate your skills with digital certificates you can share on your professional profiles.

cta.title: Ready to start your journey?
cta.description: Join thousands of developers who are already improving their skills with LMS V2.

creators.heroTitle: Create, Sell & Scale Your Online Courses with AI
creators.heroSubtitle: The first AI-native platform for course creators. Auto-grade exams, engage students with gamification, and grow your business — no plugins needed.

differentiators.title: Why Creators Choose LMS V2
differentiators.subtitle: Three things that set us apart from every other course platform.

ai.title: AI Auto-Grading
ai.description: AI grades exams and provides personalized feedback automatically. Save hours of manual grading.

gamification.title: Built-in Gamification
gamification.description: XP, levels, streaks, achievements, and a rewards store. Keep students engaged like Duolingo.

modern.title: Modern & Fast
modern.description: Built on Next.js and Supabase. Your school loads instantly, works on any device, and scales automatically.

features.title: Everything You Need to Teach Online
features.subtitle: From content creation to payments, we handle the infrastructure so you can focus on teaching.

editor.title: Rich Content Editor
editor.description: MDX-powered lessons with code blocks, images, embeds, and interactive components. Write once, render beautifully.

exams.title: Exam Builder
exams.description: Multiple choice, open-ended, and true/false questions. AI grades free-text answers with detailed feedback.

exercises.title: Exercise System
exercises.description: Interactive coding challenges with an AI assistant that guides students through problem-solving.

payments.title: Stripe Payments
payments.description: Sell courses individually or via subscription plans. Accept credit cards with zero platform transaction fees.

dashboard.title: Student Dashboard
dashboard.description: Beautiful progress tracking, lesson completions, achievements, and streak counters that motivate students.

analytics.title: Analytics & Insights
analytics.description: Track enrollments, revenue, completion rates, and student engagement from your teacher dashboard.

comparison.title: See How We Compare
comparison.subtitle: We built LMS V2 to give creators more features at a fraction of the cost.
comparison.footnote: * Udemy is free to publish but takes up to 63% revenue share on organic sales.

pricing.title: Plans That Grow With You
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees, no surprises.

cta.title: Start Building Your Course Today
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of creators who are already earning revenue on LMS V2. Your first course is free.

about.title: Built for learning, by educators
about.description: LMS V2 is a modern learning platform that helps teachers create courses and students learn with clarity. We focus on speed, accessibility, and delightful UX.
about.missionDescription: Make high-quality learning accessible. We build tools that empower teachers and keep students engaged through clear content, progressive feedback, and reliable assessments.
about.feature1: Courses and lessons with MDX support
about.feature3: Teacher tools for building and grading exams

innovation.title: Constant Innovation
innovation.desc: We use the latest technologies to offer a cutting-edge learning experience.

accessibility.title: Universal Accessibility
accessibility.desc: We design so that everyone can learn, regardless of their abilities or location.

quality.title: Educational Quality
quality.desc: We are committed to excellence in every lesson and resource we offer.

coursesCatalog.title: Educational Courses
coursesCatalog.description: Master the latest technologies and advance your career with our premium, expert-led development tutorials and interactive lessons.

emptyState.title: No courses listed yet
emptyState.description: We are currently preparing more educational content for you. Please check back later!

pricing.title: Choose Your Learning Path
pricing.description: Unlock your potential with our flexible pricing plans designed for learners of all levels. Upgrade anytime as your skills grow.

empty.title: New Plans Coming Soon
empty.description: We're currently updating our subscription options to bring you more value. Check back shortly for updated pricing.

questions.discounts: Do you offer discounts for students?
questions.paymentMethods: What payment methods do you accept?

certificates.completeAllLessons: Complete all lessons to earn your certificate

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.description: Choose your payment method to continue.

enrollment.title: Complete Enrollment
enrollment.description: This course is free. Click below to start learning.

payment.offlineInstructions: Request payment instructions. We'll send you details for bank transfer or other offline methods.

empty.title: No Product Selected
empty.description: It seems you haven't selected a course or plan to purchase.

toasts.paymentSuccess: Payment successful! You are now enrolled.
toasts.requestSent: Payment request sent! Check your email for instructions.

manual.title: Manual Payment Checkout
manual.subtitle: Request payment instructions to complete your purchase

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Follow these simple steps to complete your purchase
howItWorks.step1: Submit the payment request form with your contact information
howItWorks.step2: Receive payment instructions via email (bank transfer, invoice, etc.)
howItWorks.step3: Complete the payment using your preferred method
howItWorks.step4: Get instant access once payment is confirmed

welcome.title: Welcome, {name}!
welcome.description: Let's set up your online school in just a few steps. You'll be ready to create courses in under 5 minutes.
welcome.step1: Name your school and tell students what you teach
welcome.step2: Customize your brand colors and logo
welcome.step3: Create your first course and start teaching

school.title: Your School
school.description: Give your school a name and description that students will see.
school.namePlaceholder: e.g. Code Academy, Design School, Music Lab
school.nameHint: This appears in the navbar, emails, and certificates
school.descriptionPlaceholder: What do you teach? Who is it for?
school.descriptionHint: A short description for your school's landing page

branding.title: Brand Your School
branding.description: Make it yours with custom colors and a logo. You can change these later in Settings.
branding.logoHint: Paste a URL to your logo image (PNG or SVG recommended)

payment.title: Payment Setup
payment.description: Connect your Stripe account to start accepting payments from students.
payment.whyDescription: Accept payments and get paid directly to your bank account.
payment.benefit2: Automatic payouts to your bank account
payment.benefit4: Track all revenue in your dashboard
payment.revenueSplitNote: You keep 80% of all course sales. The platform fee covers hosting, support, and maintenance.
payment.skipWarning: You can connect your payment account later from Settings, but you won't be able to sell courses until you do.

ready.title: You're All Set!
ready.description: Your school is configured and ready to go. What would you like to do next?

complete.error: Failed to save settings. Please try again.

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: Manage your school's subscription and billing
billing.freePlanNote: You are on the free plan. Upgrade to unlock more features.
billing.pastDue: Your payment is past due. Please update your payment method to avoid service interruption.

upgradePage.title: Upgrade Your Plan
upgradePage.description: Choose the plan that best fits your school's needs

platformPricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
platformPricing.description: Start free and scale as you grow. No hidden fees, no long-term contracts. Upgrade or downgrade anytime.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.description: Create your school for free and upgrade whenever you need more.

featureGate.locked: This feature requires the {plan} plan or higher

limits.approaching: You're using {current} of {limit} {resource}. Consider upgrading for more.
limits.reached: You've reached your {resource} limit ({limit}). Upgrade your plan to add more.
limits.studentLimitReached: This school has reached its student limit. Please contact the school administrator.
limits.courseLimitReached: You've reached your course limit. Upgrade your plan to create more courses.

revenue.title: Revenue
revenue.description: Track your school's revenue and earnings
revenue.noRevenue: No revenue data yet. Start selling courses to see your earnings here.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for.

generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or contact support if the issue persists.

landingPageBuilder.title: Pages
landingPageBuilder.subtitle: Design and publish custom pages for your school — landing pages, about, contact, and more.
landingPageBuilder.createFirstDescription: Start from a template or build from scratch. Create landing pages, about pages, FAQ pages, and more.

featureGate.title: Page Builder
featureGate.description: Create beautiful, customizable pages for your school with our drag-and-drop builder. Available on Starter plan ($9/mo) and above.

pageCard.publishFirst: Publish the page first before activating it.

errors.createFailed: Failed to create page. Please try again.
errors.deleteFailed: Failed to delete page. Please try again.
errors.duplicateFailed: Failed to duplicate page. Please try again.
errors.activateFailed: Failed to activate page. Please try again.
errors.deactivateFailed: Failed to deactivate page. Please try again.
errors.saveFailed: Failed to save changes. Please try again.
errors.publishFailed: Failed to publish page. Please try again.

deleteDialog.title: Delete page?
deleteDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. The page and all its sections will be permanently deleted.

templatePicker.title: Choose a starting point
templatePicker.description: Pick a template to get started quickly, or begin from scratch. You can customize everything later.
templatePicker.choosePageTypeDescription: Choose a page type or enter a custom URL slug. This determines where the page will be accessible.

sectionDescriptions.hero: Main banner with title, subtitle, and CTA buttons
sectionDescriptions.features: Grid of feature cards with icons and descriptions
sectionDescriptions.courses: Auto-populated course grid from your catalog
sectionDescriptions.image_text: Image and text side by side
sectionDescriptions.contact: Contact info, email, and social links

builder.noSectionsDescription: Add your first section to get started.
builder.noSelectionDescription: Select a section from the left panel, or add a new one.
builder.settingsDescription: Configure the header navigation and footer for your page. These settings apply globally.
builder.pageSlugHint: Use "home" for the main landing page. Other slugs are accessible at /p/your-slug.
builder.previewBannerDescription: This is how your page will look when published.

editor.editContent: Edit the content for this section.

courses.title: Section Title
courses.subtitle: Subtitle
courses.autoPopulated: Courses are auto-populated from your published catalog. No manual configuration needed.

video.title: Title
video.subtitle: Subtitle
video.videoUrlHint: Supports YouTube, Vimeo, or any direct video URL

pricing.title: Section Title
pricing.subtitle: Subtitle
pricing.autoLoadHint: When enabled, published products are automatically shown as pricing cards with their names, descriptions, and prices.

banner.countdownHint: ISO date format. Leave empty for no countdown.

headerFooter.noCustomLinks: No custom links. Default links (Courses, About) will be shown.
headerFooter.label: Label
headerFooter.noCustomColumns: No custom columns. Default footer columns will be shown.

footer.defaultDescription: Empowering the next generation of learners with cutting-edge technology.

audio.title: Audio Exercise
audio.analyzingDescription: Transcribing audio and generating AI feedback. This may take up to 30 seconds.
audio.uploadLimit: Upload: max 25 MB (MP3, M4A, WAV, OGG, WebM)
audio.passedMessage: Great job! You reached the passing score. Your exercise has been marked as complete.
audio.notPassedMessage: Review the feedback below and try again to reach the passing score of {score}.
audio.dailyLimitMessage: You've used all {limit} attempts for today. Come back tomorrow to try again!
audio.micDenied: Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone access and try again.
audio.unsupportedFile: Unsupported file type. Allowed: MP3, M4A, OGG, WAV, WebM, AAC.
audio.fileTooLarge: File too large ({size} MB). Maximum is {max} MB.
audio.audioTooShort: Audio is too short ({duration}s). Minimum is {min}s.
audio.audioTooLong: Audio is too long ({duration}s). Maximum is {max}s.
audio.exerciseMarkedComplete: This exercise has been marked as complete. Great work!

list.title: Practice Arena
list.subtitle: Challenge yourself with interactive activities and coding tasks.

empty.title: No exercises found
empty.description: There are no active exercises for this course at the moment.

list.title: Assessments
list.subtitle: Demonstrate your knowledge and earn your certification.

empty.title: No exams available
empty.description: Evaluations for this course will appear here when published.
